summary: Tested admin settings improvements: Pricing Configuration with 14 user types, SEO sub-tab with search/pagination, Communications with search. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin settings improvements verified: 1) Pricing tab shows all 14 role types (surfer, grom, photographer, grom_parent, hobbyist, comp_surfer, pro_surfer, approved_pro_photographer, surf_school, shop, shaper, resort, wave_pool, destination). 2) Content > SEO sub-tab has search functionality and pagination (15 items per page, 1447 total spots). 3) Communications tab has search in all sub-tabs (Announcements, Templates, Campaigns).

pricing_14_roles.details: All 14 role types found: Surfer, Grom, Photographer, Grom Parent, Hobbyist, Competition Surfer, Pro Surfer, Verified Pro Photographer, Surf School, Surf Shop, Shaper, Resort/Retreat, Wave Pool, Surf Destination

seo_search.details: Search input found in SEO sub-tab, filters spots by name/region/country

seo_pagination.details: Pagination shows 'Showing 1-15 of 1447' with prev/next buttons

communications_search.details: Search input found in all 3 sub-tabs: Announcements, Templates, Campaigns
